title: Avignon, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Avignon, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Avignon is a city in Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur with a population of 92,000. The City of Popes with a magnificent medieval Papal Palace, a famous theater festival, and the iconic Pont d’Avignon.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
